LAW AND MOTION 301, RE: MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF PAGA CAUSE OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MCGARVEY'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF PAGA CAUSE OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE SHOWN AND NO OPPOSITION FILED. A PROPOSED ORDER HAS BEEN SUBMITTED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Paga Cause Of Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MCGARVEY's, AN INDIVIDUAL, Motion For Dismissal Of Paga Cause Of Action Without Prejudice.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling: Plaintiff Michael McGarvey's motion for dismissal of PAGA cause of action without prejudice is granted. Good cause shown and no opposition filed.

A proposed order has been submitted.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/HEK)
